title: cyrtandra occidens
intro: Cyrtandra occidens is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the Western Cyrtandra or West Hawaii Cyrtandra, native to the western part of the island of Hawaii. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyrtandra occidens include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and poultices for topical application, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
